text.title: Stakeholder Analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Register contains plausible-sounding roles never verified against org chart.
antipattern.fix: Cross-check every name against org-chart CSV; reject unverified entries.

antipattern.root-cause: Author treats RACI as a brainstorm.
antipattern.fix: Enforce exactly one Accountable per row via raci-lint.sh.

antipattern.symptom: Informed list is auto-populated with every stakeholder.
antipattern.fix: Cap Informed at ≤5 names per artefact unless justified.
